texto: I searched for my own heartand long after I had lost my wayin the days trailing past with their foliagein the aloof sky blue with distanceI thought I'd find my heartwhere I'd kept your eyes two brown butterfliesand I saw the swallows swoopand shadows starlings
explicacao: Citação de Ingrid Jonker sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I searched for my own heartand long after I had lost my wayin the days trailing past with their f…” articula reflexao, poetry, searched em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
